contentCadence.purpose: Publish factual GCA project updates, Go China narrative notes, product-readiness updates, and community verification reminders without investment promises.

publishedPosts.title: GCA is building Go China Access
message: GCA is building Go China Access.
A fixed-supply Base token connecting the China macro story with future non-custodial quant risk tools, market education, and member access.
Not custody. No return promises. Not financial advice.
publishedPosts.claimBoundary: Launch positioning only; no listing, audit, price, or security-vendor approval claim.

publishedPosts.title: Building transparently on Base
message: GCA / Go China Access is building on Base: fixed-supply GCA, public docs, wallet verification, member access, and credits for future China-facing Web3 tools.
No return promises. Just building transparently.
publishedPosts.claimBoundary: Project update only; no market forecast, no return promise, no external audit claim.

nextContentQueue.angle: Explain the Go China narrative and link readers to the public radar page.
Explain that member access and credits are planned utility workflows, with public self-service claiming still gated by release readiness.
Remind users to verify Base Mainnet, the contract address, the official GCA/USDT route, and current risk boundaries.

safeMessagingRules: Use the official website, X, Telegram, contract address, and GCA/USDT route only.
Frame GCA as a fixed-supply Base token and concept-stage access layer for future China-facing Web3 tools.
State that public self-service member claiming is not live until release gates are completed.
State that no third-party audit has been completed unless an independent report is publicly available.
State that starter-depth liquidity can create high slippage and price impact.
doNotClaim: price targets, returns, market predictions, or investment advice
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval or permanent wallet-warning clearance without vendor confirmation
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, LP lock, reserve lock, vesting, buyback, or price support before verifiable evidence exists
